title: Cpatman
compiled_truth: Cpatman is an external contact at [Bracewell & Patterson](companies/bracewell). Over the corpus period (1999-07-06 to 2001-11-03), Cpatman sent 6 and received 43 emails, totalling 49 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard B Sanders](people/richard-b-sanders) (6), [Knunnally](people/knunnally-velaw) (6), [Nmanne](people/nmanne-susmangodfrey) (5), [Lsutherland](people/lsutherland-velaw) (2), [Mcarroll](people/mcarroll-bracepatt) (2).
